description:
A screenshot displaying a vertical user interface menu with three options for managing Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data ingestions. Each option includes an icon and associated text:
1.  An eye icon, labelled "Open", suggesting an action to view or access an ingested data layer.
2.  An overlapping squares icon, labelled "Reuse", likely for reusing existing ingestion configurations or data.
3.  An eye icon with a diagonal line through it, labelled "Unpublish", indicating an action to make a previously published ingestion unavailable.
